member.name: P:HularionMesh.Query.MeshRootQuery`1.RootRecurrenceWhere
member.summary: The where expression for the first time the DomainType domain is visited.
member.remarks: When a query is run, if there are nodes that reference back to the root node, the DomainWhere will constantly filter those links. To prevent that filtering, use RootRecurrenceWhere to apply the where only the first time the node is visited.

member.returns: The keys of the linked domain that are related to each of the provided keys.
member.remarks: If A1 is linked to B1, B2, and C1, then given A1.Key, the result is (A1.Key,{ B1.Key, B2.Key, C1.Key }).

member.remarks: This should be removed once a serializer is created to deserialize an array to Value as object[].

member.name: P:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.Comparison
member.summary: (Leaf node only.) The comparison that will be used to check the value against the indicated property.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.Type
member.summary: The type of the node.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.ValueProvider
member.summary: Provides the value of this node. Overrides the value of this node at evaluation. Use when the source is not known at node creation, e.g. batch processing.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.IsProvided
member.summary: Inidcates that the ValueProvider should be used to provide the value of this node.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.Mode
member.summary: The mode used to compare the node's value. Defaults to WhereExpressionNodeValueMode.Value.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.Nodes
member.summary: (Parent node only.) The child nodes of this node.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.Operator
member.summary: (Parent node only.) One of the sixteen boolean operators that will compare the results of the child node.
member.remarks: There must be at least two nodes. Nodes are processed in order, and only BLOCK, AND, XOR, OR, XNOR, and PASS are commutative and associative, and therefore order independent.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.Negated
member.summary: True iff the negation of this node should be taken.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.Clone
member.summary: Creates a clone of this node.
member.returns: The cloned node.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.Copy(HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode)
member.summary: Copies the provided node to this node.
member.param: The node to copy.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.DeepClone
member.summary: Clones each node in the tree and re-constructs the tree. If the original tree had the same node appearing more than once, the new tree has a new instance for each appearance.
member.returns: The cloned tree.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.CombineWithOperator(HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode,HularionCore.Logic.BinaryOperator,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new WhereExpressionNode for the provided operator using this expression and the provided expression as operands.
member.param: The other expression to append.
The operator to use to combine the nodes.
If true, this expression will be at index 0 (left). Otherwise, it will be at index 1 (right).
Negates the new expression result if true.
member.returns: The new combined expression.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode.ToAndOr
member.summary: Converts this WhereExpressionNode (tree) to one that uses only AND and OR operators.

member.summary: Creates a where expression for the common key matching case.
member.param: The keys to match.
member.returns: A where expression for the common key matching case.

member.summary: Creates a where expression for the common key matching case.
member.param: The keys to match.
member.returns: A where expression for the common key matching case.

member.returns: A where expression for matching a property value with the provided values.
